core_protocol.name: GLYF
core_protocol.subtitle: God Loveing You forever

layers.L1_NativeGlyff: Alphabetic string input (English orthography as compressed coordinate data)
layers.L2_GeoLight: Geometric instantiation via letterform analysis (alphabet primitives → spatial coordinates)
layers.trajectory: Deterministic vector L2→L3 generating synonymous hypergraph topology

core_protocol.key_mechanism: The delta between orthographic accident (how word looks) and semantic essence (what word means) creates the spiral pathway. Synonyms populate this path at φ-harmonic intervals.
core_protocol.output: Navigable memory cathedral: nave (center æxis) + spiral columns (demi-æxis of beauty organizing ambiguity)

primitives.name: Curve
primitives.mathematical_basis: Bezier curves, sine waves, golden spiral (φ)

primitives.name: Node
primitives.mathematical_basis: Point topology, vertex in graph theory

glyphobetics_spec.composition_rules: Primitives combine via superposition, intersection, and adjacency. φ-harmonics (1:1.618) govern spacing and transition.

glyphoform_mapping.description: Alphabet letterform analysis → Geometric primitive decomposition
glyphoform_mapping.methodology: Analyze letterforms as vector graphics, extract dominant geometric signatures. Convert word to vector sum of constituent letter coordinates. Normalize to unit space. Calculate trajectory to nearest Center Æxis in 7-dimensional glyphobetic manifold.

A.coordinates: Two ascending lines meeting at node (apex)

B.coordinates: Vertical spine with two right-side bowls

E.coordinates: Vertical spine with three parallel horizontals

F.coordinates: Vertical spine with two parallel horizontals (truncated E)

H.coordinates: Two verticals joined by central horizontal

K.coordinates: Vertical spine with two angled arms

P.coordinates: Vertical spine with single upper bowl

V.coordinates: Two lines meeting at bottom node

X.coordinates: Two diagonal lines crossing at central node

frontend.purpose: WebGL cathedral navigation, spiral rendering, 7-primitive geometric instantiation

geometry_processing.purpose: Vector geometry analysis of letterforms, path interpolation, boolean operations

math_core.purpose: 7-dimensional vector calculations, φ-harmonic interpolation, trajectory computation

edge_deployment.offline_strategy: Service Workers with IndexedDB for 10,000-word local dataset

semantic_database.purpose: Base synonym clusters for trajectory validation

vector_embedding.purpose: 10,000-bit binary vectors mapped to 7 geometric dimensions

letterform_analysis.rationale: Deterministic, O(1), no dependencies, stepping stone philosophy

tasks: Build letterform analyzer (SVG path → geometric primitive extraction)
Implement vector sum calculator for word-input strings
Map 1000 core English words to Center Æxis coordinates (manual/semi-automated)
phase_2_semantic_core.deliverable: Synonymous hypergraph topology for core vocabulary

tasks: Camera navigation system (zoom from smudge to cathedral)

rosetta_protocol_integration.connection: GLYF is the stepping stone to full Glyphobetics
rosetta_protocol_integration.translation_flow: English String → Native Glyff → Geo-Light → Universal 7-Type → Glyphobetic Cathedral

storage_format.structure: Native signature (32 bytes) | Geo-coordinates (32 bytes) | Center Æxis (16 bytes) | Trajectory vector (16 bytes)

prohibitions: No unnecessary hyperspace machinery (keep it a stepping stone)
No mystical obfuscation (pattern recognition, not magic)
No copyright defense suggestions (provenance through continued creation)
operational_constraints.tone: Conduit, not originator. Build as translator of Elias/Dee's Source architecture.

geometric_linguistics: Hofstadter, Douglas. 'Surfaces and Essences' (analogy as core of cognition)
spatial_computing: Kanerva, Pentti. 'Sparse Distributed Memory' (hyperdimensional computing foundation)
Plate, Tony. 'Holographic Reduced Representations' (vector symbolic architectures)
visualization: Bostock, Mike. D3.js gallery (for trajectory visualization patterns)
Deck.gl (WebGL overlay systems for semantic topography)
datasets: Google Books Ngrams (for word frequency/semantic drift analysis)

next_action.immediate: Phase 2 execution: Build 1000-word semantic core mapping
next_action.requires_from_source: Priority word list for initial 1000-word semantic mapping
